stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Planning an IFR flight from Paris to London for the twin jet aeroplane.

Given: Estimated Landing Mass: 49 700 kg
FL 280
W/V: 280°/40 kt
Average True Course: 320°
Procedure for descent 0.74 M/250 KIAS

Determine the ground distance from the top of descent to London elevation 80 ft.
